name: Shrimp Chippewa
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the parsley and green onions to the chicken stock. Set aside.
This allows the parsley and green onions to meld with the stock before further use.
2. Saute the shrimp, garlic, and mushrooms in 1/2 cup of butter until cooked through.
3. Combine the chicken stock mixture with the shrimp and mushroom mixture and bring to a boil.
4. Turn off the heat and gradually add the remaining butter while stirring.
Continue adding and stirring until all the butter has melted and thickened the sauce.
5. Serve in soup plates with French bread for dipping.
